'''Minor Relsted''' was an official of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He was initially an assistant to [[Supervisor/Legends|Supervisor]] [[Gurdun]] during which he skimmed funds to create the [[IG-series/Legends|IG]] series of [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]]. When Gurdun left [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to supervise the acquistion and delivery of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II's]] computer core, Relsted took Gurdun's old position and office.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
